AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
33 
NN_CORE_1_RSLVD_SW 
LABEL: 
At Least 1 Core HRSN Resolved 
DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): beneficiary had at least one navigated core health related social need (HRSN) 
resolved 
LONG NAME: NN_CORE_1_RSLVD_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “NN” include information for each
